title: tribulus ranunculiflorus
intro: Tribulus ranunculiflorus, also known as Tribulus, is a type of flowering plant in the family Zygophyllaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and adaptogenic effects. The health benefits of Tribulus include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced athletic performance, and support for male reproductive health. Tribulus is often used in herbal preparations such as capsules, tablets, and teas, and is also available as an extract or powder for added convenience.
